---
title: "Bitcoin & Neo4j"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    center: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    history: true
    transition: slide
    mouse-wheel: true
---

## Bitcoin introduction

![Bitcoin distributed network](img/bitcoin1.jpg){width="90%"}

## Bitcoin introduction

![Bitcoin distributed network](img/bitcoin2.jpg){width="70%"}

## Bitcoin introduction

- Files: blkxxx.dat
- Serialized data of blocks and transactions
- Block: version, previous block, time...
- Transaction: input/output addrs, value...

![Blockchain](img/blockchain.jpeg){width="35%"}

## Blockchain graph

![](img/blockchaingraph.png){width="65%"}

## Blockchain graph (Nodes)

- Block: BlockID (height), timeStamp
- Transaction: TxID (height-txPosition, e.g. 10001-1), timeStamp, inputTotal, outputTotal
- Wallet (addrs aggregation): WalletID

![](img/unionFind.jpeg){width="75%"}

## Blockchain graph (Relationships)

- Contains (Block-Transaction)
- Input/Output (Wallet-Transaction): value

![Contains](img/contains_rel.png){width="300"}
![InOut](img/input_output_rel.png)

## Induced Transaction graph

- Node: Wallet
- Relationship: Sent_to {timeStamp, value}

![](img/inoutSent.jpeg)

## Induced Transaction graph

![](img/txgraph.png){width="55%"}

# Thank you
